items.title: I Went to VSPO Fes 2025!
items.author: Linsaloty
items.content:
<article>本動画はイベントの雰囲気を記録したVlogです。
通行人の映り込みがある場合がありますが、ご了承ください。

Find me on X: https://twitter.com/linsaloty
BGM: "Secret Adventure" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks
"Traveller" by https://www.youtube.com/@UC3_tcjJS_a1NpDpYaCCTwcw 
"Listen" by https://www.youtube.com/@UC3_tcjJS_a1NpDpYaCCTwcw 
"Moonside Howl" by https://www.youtube.com/@UC3_tcjJS_a1NpDpYaCCTwcw 
"Get Ready" by https://www.youtube.com/@UC3_tcjJS_a1NpDpYaCCTwcw 
"Goodnight" by https://www.youtube.com/@UC3_tcjJS_a1NpDpYaCCTwcw 
"Treat" by https://www.youtube.com/@UC3_tcjJS_a1NpDpYaCCTwcw 
"Gamers" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks
"Shower" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks
"Party Time" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks

VSPO! Related playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZA05Mx0fct6YHBVRlDpiVcthQEPMSKgp

▼Related Links▼
Official site: https://event.vspo.jp/vspo-festival-2025/

0:00 - Outside the venue
4:48 - Inside the venue

9:11 - Goods area

28:53 - Quick note about the concert
30:15 - Random cards gacha
33:14 - Final thoughts</article>
